info.title: MatchPoint API
info.description: Pickleball / Tennis / Padel platform — internal + external API. Schemas autogenerated from Zod (single source of truth). See docs/architecture/60-openapi.md.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Sign up / sign in / sign out / switch role

tags.name: ClubApplications
tags.description: Solicitar Club wizard (5 steps + review pipeline)

post.summary: Create a new account
post.description: Creates an auth.users row, fires the auto-profile trigger and sets `mp_active_role=user` cookie.

post.summary: Sign in with email + password
Sign out the current session and clear cookies
Switch the active role for the current session
post.description: Validates that the user has the requested role assigned (optionally scoped to a club) and updates the `mp_active_role` cookie.

get.summary: Current session: profile + roles + active scope
Get the current user's most recent club application (if any)

post.summary: Start a new club application (draft)
post.description: Creates an empty draft bound to the current user. Fails with 409 ALREADY_OPEN if the user already has an active application (draft or any review status).

get.summary: Get application detail (application + courts + docs + photos + events)

patch.summary: Autosave a wizard step (discriminated by step)
patch.description: Body shape: `{ step: 1|2|3, data: <step-partial> }`. Server advances `currentStep` when minimum required fields for the step are present.

delete.summary: Withdraw an application (allowed only while draft or submitted)

post.summary: Add a proposed court to an application
Submit a draft application for review
post.description: Transitions status `draft → submitted`. Requires the applicant to have accepted terms and the basics (name, taxId, contactEmail, address) to be present.

post.summary: submitted → docs_review

409.description: Transition not allowed in current state

post.summary: docs_review → field_verification (schedule)

409.description: Transition not allowed in current state

post.summary: Mark field verification completed (status stays field_verification)

409.description: Transition not allowed in current state

post.summary: field_verification → final_review

409.description: Transition not allowed in current state

post.summary: final_review → approved (materializes club + assigns owner role)
post.description: Calls `fn_materialize_club_from_application` which atomically creates the club, settings, courts, photos and the `owner` role assignment.

409.description: Transition not allowed in current state

post.summary: Reject from any non-terminal status

409.description: Transition not allowed in current state

post.summary: Add a reviewer note (logs a note_added event)

409.description: Transition not allowed in current state

post.summary: Approve a submitted document

409.description: Transition not allowed in current state

post.summary: Reject a submitted document with a reason

409.description: Transition not allowed in current state

post.summary: Upload a required document (multipart)
Upload a gallery photo (multipart, max 6 per application)

get.summary: Get a club detail (public). Accepts UUID or slug

patch.summary: Update a club (owner/manager). Optimistic-locked via expectedVersion

get.summary: List courts of a club (public). Accepts UUID or slug

post.summary: Create a court (owner/manager)

409.description: Court code already exists in this club
Court code already exists in this club

delete.summary: Archive a court (soft delete via active=false)

get.summary: List reservations (RLS-filtered: organizer self, club staff, or public-visibility rows)

post.summary: Create a reservation
post.description: Anti-double-booking enforced by Postgres EXCLUDE constraint. Supports `Idempotency-Key` header.

get.summary: Get a reservation with its participants

post.summary: Cancel a reservation (organizer or club staff)
post.description: Organizers must cancel within the club's `cancellation_window_hours`. Staff can override.

post.summary: Create a walk-in (employee/manager). Materializes as both a walkin row and a checked_in reservation

get.summary: List cash sessions for a club (staff only)

post.summary: Open a new cash session (staff). Fails if one is already open for the club
Close an open cash session. Computes expected and variance from captured cash txs
Record a transaction (employee/coach/manager). Auto-attaches to the club's open cash session

422.description: Cash without open session, or business rule violation

get.summary: List pro shop products (public). Filters: clubId, q, categoryId, activeOnly

post.summary: Quick-sale (employee POS). Creates transaction + sale + decrements stock
post.description: Validates stock and currency mix, attaches to open cash session for cash payments. Idempotent via Idempotency-Key.

get.summary: Coach detail: profile + specialties + availability + certs + reviews + clubIds
List classes (public). Filters: clubId, coachId, sport, activeOnly
Class detail with upcoming sessions and enrolled count

post.summary: Enroll in a class (self or coach-on-behalf). Falls to waitlist if full

get.summary: Students of the current coach with their progress

put.summary: Upsert progress for a (student, skill) by current coach

post.summary: Add an evaluation for a student
Create a resource (coach)

get.summary: List my conversations (with last message + unread count)

post.summary: Start a conversation. DMs with one other user reuse an existing thread

get.summary: Conversation detail with members and recent messages

post.summary: Send a message
Mark conversation as read up to a message id
Send a friend request
Accept a pending friend request
Reject a pending friend request
Create a team (the creator becomes captain)

get.summary: Team detail with members and pending invites

post.summary: Invite a user (captain only)
Accept a pending team invite
Submit a match result (one participant). Status starts as 'reported'
Confirm a reported result (another participant). Triggers ranking recompute
Create a league (partner-admin)
Create a tournament (partner-admin)
Register a team or duo to a tournament. Idempotent. Accepts UUID or slug
Create an event (club staff or partner-admin)
Publish a draft event. Accepts UUID or slug
Register the current user to an event. Idempotent. Accepts UUID or slug

422.description: Event not in a registerable state

get.summary: My notification feed (RLS-filtered by active role)

post.summary: Mark a single notification as read
Mark all my notifications as read (optionally per role)
Create a broadcast (admin / club staff / partner-admin per scope)
Cancel a draft/scheduled broadcast
Report content (any user)
Act on a report (admin)
Open a ticket. Body becomes the first message
Reply to a ticket. internal=true hides from opener
Upsert a flag (admin)

get.summary: My effective flag map (resolved via cascade user > club > role > default)

post.summary: Create a partner org (admin). Inserts the requested owner

get.summary: Partner detail with members and club link count
